privileged_info_summary: The task uses real DICOM data from the official InVesalius v3.0 release asset 0051.zip (CT Cranium sample). The DICOM series 0051 is imported from /home/ga/DICOM/ct_cranium/0051. The task requires saving an angular measurement to /home/ga/Documents/cranial_angle.inv3, with anatomically valid cranial angles in the range 30-170 degrees. These angle bounds encompass typical cephalometric measurements: skull base angles normally range 100-129°, but the 30-170° range allows for various other cranial angles (e.g., vertical angles ~27°, anteroposterior angles 78-81°).
